missions.name: Rat Infestation
missions.description: Clear the cellar of oversized rats before they reach the grain stores.

steps.text: You descend into the damp cellar, torch in hand. Squeaks echo from the shadows.
A swarm of rats charges. You fight them off with quick strikes.
The last rat falls. The innkeeper owes you a drink—and coin.

missions.name: Lost Package
missions.description: A merchant's courier vanished on the forest road. Recover the parcel.

steps.text: You follow muddy tracks into the woods.
A bandit camp holds the crate. You slip in and grab it.
The merchant pays well for discretion.

missions.name: Herb Gathering
missions.description: Collect moonpetal flowers from the meadow before dawn.

steps.text: Moonlight washes the meadow silver.
Wolves prowl nearby—you gather quickly and retreat.
The apothecary inspects your haul and nods approvingly.

missions.name: Bandit Scouts
missions.description: Scouts report bandits near the trade road. Drive them off.

steps.text: You spot smoke from a roadside camp.
The bandits scatter after a brief skirmish.
The guild clerk stamps your contract complete.

missions.name: Haunted Mill
missions.description: Strange lights flicker in the abandoned mill. Investigate the source.

steps.title: The Forgotten Shrine
steps.text: A crumbling shrine stands half-buried in ivy at the mill's edge. Cold mist coils around broken stone idols, and faint whispers ride the wind.

choices.label: Explore the Shrine
choices.subtitle: Search for relics and hidden passages

choices.label: Take the Safe Path
choices.subtitle: Circle the shrine and press toward the mill

choices.label: Attempt Persuasion
choices.subtitle: Offer tribute to calm the restless dead

choices.label: Set Camp
choices.subtitle: Rest and restore before entering the mill

steps.title: The Creaking Wheel
steps.text: The mill wheel groans though no water flows. Lantern light dances across rotting timber and suspiciously fresh footprints.

steps.title: Smuggler's Stash
steps.text: Will-o-wisps lead you not to ghosts, but to a smuggler's cache hidden beneath the floorboards. Coin, contraband, and a ledger of bribes.

missions.name: Escort Caravan
missions.description: Guard a spice caravan through goblin territory.

steps.text: The caravan rolls out at first light.
Goblins ambush at the ravine—you hold the line.
Spices delivered. The merchant shares a generous cut.

missions.name: Crypt Cleanup
missions.description: Undead stir in the old burial grounds. Put them back to rest.

steps.text: Tombstones lean like rotten teeth.
Skeletons rise—you shatter bone and curse alike.
The gravekeeper pays from the church coffers.

missions.name: Noble's Errand
missions.description: Deliver a sealed letter to a rival house without being caught.

steps.text: You blend into the city crowds at dusk.
House guards almost spot you—you use a side alley.
The letter is delivered. Gold follows by morning.

missions.name: Wyvern Nest
missions.description: A wyvern nests too close to farmland. Scare it off or slay it.

steps.text: Wingbeats shake the cliffs as you climb.
The wyvern dives—you dodge and strike its wing.
It flees the valley. Farmers cheer your name.

missions.name: Artifact Recovery
missions.description: Recover a stolen relic from a cult hideout in the sewers.

steps.text: Sewer tunnels reek of incense and rot.
Cultists guard the relic—you fight through chanting halls.
The temple rewards you with gold and a blessing.

missions.name: Dragon Scale Hunt
missions.description: Collect shed scales from a young dragon's hunting grounds.

steps.text: Scorched earth marks the dragon's territory.
You wait until it hunts, then gather scales under ash clouds.
The armorer pays a fortune for rare material.

missions.name: Demon Binding
missions.description: A summoning circle flickers in the ruins. Break the ritual.

steps.text: Arcane symbols pulse with sickly light.
A lesser demon manifests—you shatter the focus stone.
The circle collapses. Mages guild pays hazard rates.

missions.name: Lich Sigil
missions.description: Destroy a phylactery fragment before it regrows full power.

steps.text: Cold drains warmth from the tomb air.
Wraiths guard the sigil—you destroy it in a blaze of faith.
The lich's influence wanes. Royal coin follows.

missions.name: Void Rift
missions.description: Seal a tear in reality before horrors spill into the kingdom.

steps.text: Reality warps—grass floats, stars show at noon.
You anchor the rift with ancient wards and sheer will.
Scholars record your deed. The crown pays in gold.

missions.name: World-Ender's Echo
missions.description: Face the echo of an ancient destroyer trapped in a crystal prison.

steps.text: The crystal hums with apocalyptic memory.
The echo takes form—you battle across shattered time.
Silence returns. Legends will speak of this day.
